sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value VARCHAR(255), nullable_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (1, 'test1', NULL), (2, 'test2', 'example'), (3, NULL, 'sample');
SELECT id, sql:GROUP_DIGEST(value, ' ', 1000, 1) AS concatenated_values, (10 / COUNT(*) ) AS average_id FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING average_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, sql:GROUP_DIGEST(t2.value, ' - ', 100, 1) AS combined_values FROM test_data AS t1 JOIN test_data AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.id;
SELECT (sql:GROUP_DIGEST(value, '-', 1000, 1) / 10) AS altered_value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY value HAVING altered_value > 0;
SELECT id, (SQLCASCADE(value) / 3.5) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data WHERE nullable_value IS NULL ORDER BY adjusted_value DESC;
SELECT id, sql:GROUP_DIGEST(COALESCE(nullable_value, ''), '|', 1000, 1) AS safe_concatenation FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING LENGTH(safe_concatenation) > 0;
SELECT (sql:GROUP_DIGEST(NULLIF(value, ''), ' ', 1000, 1) / NULLIF(id, 0)) AS risky_division FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT (sql:GROUP_DIGEST(value, ', ', 1000, 1) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) AS avg_values FROM test_data GROUP BY value HAVING avg_values < 2;
SELECT (sql:GROUP_DIGEST(value, '|', 1000, 1) / (CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT(*) END)) AS case_avg FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
